推荐场景: 服务谈判现场｜评估并回应补偿方案
60秒任务: 「接受/拒绝方案」：投诉/政策/要求/方案；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 投诉｜政策｜责任｜要求｜补偿｜解决方案评估
场景族: 诊所前台｜银行/服务窗口｜邮局｜维修柜台｜咨询室
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
That solution works for me.（接受方案）
I can accept that if ___.（条件接受）
That seems reasonable.（认可合理）
I appreciate the offer, but it doesn’t solve the problem.（拒绝但保留礼貌）
I’m afraid that won’t be enough.（说明不足）
Could we adjust the solution slightly?（要求微调）
I’d prefer a refund rather than a voucher.（偏好选择）
What would the replacement timeline be?（确认更换时间）
If you can confirm that in writing, I’ll accept it.（书面确认后接受）
I need to check one detail before I agree.（同意前核实）
That’s a fair compromise.（接受折中）
I don’t think this addresses the main issue.（指出未解决核心）
Can we consider another option?（请求其他方案）
I’m willing to meet halfway.（愿意让步）
Let’s confirm the final arrangement.（确认最终安排）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: solution, offer, refund, voucher, replacement, timeline, compromise, arrangement
Verbs: accept, reject, adjust, confirm, replace, solve, address, compromise
Adjectives / Status: reasonable, enough, fair, final, written, practical
Time / Place: in writing, before I agree, today, within a week, at pickup
Chunks: works for me, won’t be enough, meet halfway, main issue, final arrangement
